global.description: The ad features a vibrant orange background with an app interface preview and clear call-to-action.
global.main_message: Discover trending content with new hits every week.

elements.label: Solid orange background
elements.description: A vibrant solid orange background fills the entire banner, creating a warm and inviting atmosphere.

elements.label: App interface preview
elements.description: A rectangular area displaying a simplified app interface with circular and rectangular shapes, suggesting user-generated content.

elements.label: Small circular icon
elements.description: A small circular icon positioned within the app interface, representing a feature or content type.

elements.label: Rectangular icon
elements.description: A rectangular icon located within the app interface, indicating another feature or content type.

elements.label: Additional circular icon
elements.description: Another small circular icon within the app interface, complementing the other icons.

elements.label: Trending message
elements.description: Bold white text stating 'Watch what's trending' with a smaller line below it that reads 'New hits every week', prominently displayed at the bottom.
elements.text_content: Watch what's trending New hits every week

elements.label: StarVault logo
elements.description: The logo 'StarVault' appears in a bold font at the top left, conveying brand identity.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rounded button at the bottom center with the text 'Watch now' in white, inviting user interaction.

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: A small label marked 'UGC' in the top left corner, indicating user-generated content.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, banner, bright and modern, trending content, call to action
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top left, the app interface is centered, the body text is at the bottom, and the CTA is at the bottom center.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Watch what's trending, New hits every week, StarVault, Watch now, UGC
